cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to track the swaps step by step to figure out who ends up with which present. Let me start by listing out the initial gifts each person has. Initially: - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green present - Dave: blue present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. After this swap: - Eve now has Bob's orange ball. - Bob now has Eve's white present. So, updating the list: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: orange Second swap: Eve and Claire swap their gifts. So, Eve gives her current gift (orange ball) to Claire, and takes Claire's green present. Now: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: orange
